description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/nightly/sdk:7.0 Docker image and defines the variables LOGFILEPATH set to JUnitTestLogFile.xml and project set to zero.sync. Include a before_script that runs dotnet --version, git submodule init, git submodule update, and dotnet restore. Add a build stage with a build job that sets a build_path variable to $project, then executes cd $build_path and dotnet build --configuration Release. Add a tests stage with a test job that runs dotnet test --logger "junit;LogFilePath=$LOGFILEPATH;MethodFormat=Class;FailureBodyFormat=Verbose", always publishes zero.test/$LOGFILEPATH as a JUnit report artifact and also stores it as a path artifact.
